scripts.install:app: cd backend && npm install --include=dev --no-package-lock && cd ../frontend && npm install --include=dev --no-package-lock
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev --no-package-lock && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run clear-cache && npm run build:frontend
scripts.start: npm run install:app && npm run build && node deploy-server.js
scripts.dev: bun run clear-cache && NODE_ENV=development bun run --hot server.ts
